original_file: Auto-add teammates by domain, custom headers for OTEL, smarter MCP
email_subject: Auto-add teammates by domain, custom headers for OTEL, smarter MCP
email_body:
Neon



--------------

Neon Changelog

--------------



*

Add all users from your domain to the same Neon Team

*

Neon MCP now reads live Neon Docs

*

Custom API key header option for OTEL export



Read the full Changelog ( https://neon.com/docs/changelog?ref=Changelog+50+-+Feb+13 )



In case you missed it...



* add-mcp (GitHub ( https://github.com/neondatabase/add-mcp?ref=Changelog+50+-+Feb+13 ), Blog ( https://neon.com/blog/add-mcp?ref=Changelog+50+-+Feb+13 )) open-source tool for easier MCP installs

* Neon Data Report: We benchmarked autoscaling compute and cost efficiency across the entire platform ( https://neon.com/autoscaling-report?ref=Changelog+50+-+Feb+13 )

* Resend webhook ingester to centralize all your email data in your Neon database ( https://resend.com/docs/webhooks/ingester?ref=Changelog+50+-+Feb+13#neon )
